title: The Reply-All Incident of 2019
content: The reply-all incident of 2019. Someone sent a complaint about the CEO... to the CEO. I caught it in their outbox before it sent. Thirty seconds. That's how close it was. They still don't know.
extended_content: I was doing my morning email scan when I saw it sitting there in the outbox. My heart stopped. This person had written a whole rant about the CEO - valid frustrations, honestly - and had accidentally hit reply-all instead of forward. I deleted it so fast. Never told them. Sometimes the best communication work is preventing disasters nobody ever knows about.
when_to_tell: when discussing email mistakes or close calls
lesson: Always double-check the recipient list. Always.
